summary: ValidarEnvioInline manual shipping mode feature - FULLY VERIFIED. All UI elements present and functional. Complete E2E test passed: login -> navigate to order -> open validation dialog -> switch to manual mode -> fill form -> submit -> verify result via API.

critical_code_review_comments: ValidarEnvioInline.jsx: Mode selector correctly implemented with data-testid attributes
Manual mode form fields (agencia, codigo, observaciones) all have proper data-testid
handleSkip() correctly calls PATCH /api/ordenes/{id}/envio for agencia/codigo, then ordenesAPI.cambiarEstado
GLS mode guard 'sin autorización' now shows inline banner instead of early-return, allowing manual mode even without numero_autorizacion
All interactive elements have proper data-testid for testing

success_rate.backend: 100% - API correctly updated order state, codigo_recogida_salida, and agencia_envio
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements verified, complete flow tested

seed_data_creation: OT-DEMO-003 was used for testing and is now in 'enviado' state with manual shipping data
context_for_next_testing_agent: ValidarEnvioInline manual shipping mode fully implemented and tested. OT-DEMO-003 is now in 'enviado' state. To test again, change an order to 'reparado' state first.
